feedItems.description: allocated £11.0m to Environment & Streets (≈£92 per resident)
allocated £4.4m to Planning & Development (≈£37 per resident)
allocated £6.3m to Council Running Costs (≈£52 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £111 (4.9%) to £2364
